steps.name: There is TeamOwner with team ChannelCreation on Staging backend
User TeamOwner configures MLS for team ChannelCreation
TeamOwner enables channel feature for team ChannelCreation via backdoor
User TeamOwner adds users Member1,Member2 to team ChannelCreation with role Member
Register sender device and send connection request to receiver via backend
TeamOwner has channel conversation TestChannel in team ChannelCreation
User Member1 and Member2 are available for channel participant selection
And I see welcome screen before login
And I open staging deep link login flow
And I complete post-login permission and privacy prompts
And I see conversation TestChannel in conversation list
